```{r analytics-tag}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: asis

# Google Analytics (GA4) tag, shared and unfrozen like _footer.qmd, so old
# editions pick up the current tag on re-render. See CLAUDE.md for the details.
#
# Two things not to "fix":
#   - The loader is built with document.createElement. A literal <script src>
#     gets fetched and inlined by pandoc under embed-resources (~7 MB a report).
#   - No anonymize_ip: it is a Universal Analytics parameter, inert in GA4.
#
# The privacy settings below are only half the job; the rest are property-level
# settings in the GA4 admin UI, which win where the two disagree.
analytics_measurement_id <- "G-LCP5HXC91Q"

analytics_edition <- if (exists("params") && !is.null(params$edition)) {
  paste0(" #", params$edition)
} else {
  ""
}

# Every edition renders the same <title>, so page_title is overridden to tell
# them apart: `ga_page_title` from the params block, else title + edition +
# subtitle.
analytics_title <- if (exists("params") && !is.null(params$ga_page_title)) {
  params$ga_page_title
} else {
  paste0(
    rmarkdown::metadata$title,
    analytics_edition,
    if (!is.null(rmarkdown::metadata$subtitle)) {
      paste0(" - ", rmarkdown::metadata$subtitle)
    }
  )
}

cat(sprintf(
  '<!-- Google tag (gtag.js) -->
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}

  // Before config, so it applies to the first hit.
  gtag("consent", "default", {
    "ad_storage": "denied",
    "ad_user_data": "denied",
    "ad_personalization": "denied",
    "analytics_storage": "granted"
  });

  gtag("js", new Date());

  gtag("config", "%1$s", {
    "page_title": "%2$s",
    "allow_google_signals": false,
    "allow_ad_personalization_signals": false,
    "cookie_expires": 2592000
  });

  // Dwell time: fire each milestone once, counting only time the page is
  // actually visible. Distinct event names rather than a parameter, so they
  // report without registering a custom dimension in GA.
  (function () {
    var marks = [1, 5, 15, 30, 60, 120, 300, 600];
    var visible = 0, i = 0, last = Date.now();
    var timer = setInterval(function () {
      var now = Date.now();
      if (!document.hidden) visible += (now - last) / 1000;
      last = now;
      while (i < marks.length && visible >= marks[i]) {
        gtag("event", "read_" + marks[i] + "s");
        i++;
      }
      if (i >= marks.length) clearInterval(timer);
    }, 1000);
  })();

  (function () {
    var s = document.createElement("script");
    s.async = true;
    s.src = "https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=" + "%1$s";
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  })();
</script>',
  analytics_measurement_id,
  gsub('"', "'", analytics_title, fixed = TRUE)
))
```
